title: Refactor Database Access Layer
description: Current database calls are scattered across the routes. We need to centralize this into a repository pattern to improve testability and maintainability.
acceptance_criteria: Move all raw SQL queries from 'routes.py' into a new 'repository.py' module.
Use dependency injection to provide the repository to the route handlers.
Ensure 100% test coverage for the new repository methods using an in-memory database.
